socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. 20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 6% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 70% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 70% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.
